prd.title: Paneflow Review Redesign (Premium Multi-Agent Decision Cockpit)

stories.title: Unify the diff render path
stories.notes: agents_diff.rs 2181->871 LOC (-1310). Renders via shared diff::DiffElement + compute_head_diff pipeline; render_flat_*/parse_unified_diff/split_hunk_rows/flatten_rows deleted; row/header/gutter constants now sourced from diff::rows (18/32) for both surfaces. Per-file horizontal scroll dropped (not in AC; DiffElement has none, matches Review view). GUI perf verification pending (architecture = proven DiffElement fast path).

stories.title: Unify the git diff pipeline
stories.notes: Added diff::git::compute_head_diff (HEAD-relative; empty-tree fallback for unborn HEAD) sharing a new compute_diff_against core with compute_worktree_diff, so lockfile/512KiB/binary/count guards are identical on both surfaces. parse_unified_diff + split_hunk_rows deleted. Agents panel now consumes the imara_diff pipeline + the existing name-status-z parser tests.

stories.title: Decompose the god-files (code-motion only)
stories.notes: agents_diff.rs -> app/agents_diff/{git,model,render,mod}.rs. view.rs 2904->968 LOC, split into view/{loader,scroller,interaction,review}.rs (+ render_column/render_toolbar moved into the existing view/render.rs). Behavior-preserving code-motion: the only non-move changes are visibility widening (private fn -> pub(super), required because method visibility follows the impl-block module not the type) and path requalification (super::git/extract/syntax/review_terminal -> super::super::* from the child modules). Gates green (fmt/clippy/test 1043+5, 0 failed), identical test pass count = behavior preserved.

stories.title: Three-tier surface scale
stories.notes: Column header at a distinct chrome tier — ui.overlay on dark, ui.subtle on light (overlay==base==white on light would collide); file card=ui.surface, body=ui.base. Sticky=ui.surface.blend(text 0.06), now elevated above the inline card (was deliberately ==surface before). Theme branch on ui.base.l>0.5 in view/render.rs (chrome_tier) + diff/rows.rs palette(). GUI pass on both themes pending (headless).

stories.title: File-header decomposition
stories.notes: New diff::rows::HeaderParts{sigil,dir_prefix,basename,added,removed} built off-thread at build time (split_header_path splits at last '/'; rename arrow falls into the muted dir prefix). DisplayRow gained header:Option<HeaderParts>; SplitRow::Header(SharedString)->Header(HeaderParts) (tuple (_) patterns stayed valid; anchors use index+file.path not the string). element::paint_file_header paints typed segments: status-colored sigil + muted dir + semibold basename (new shape_weighted) + right-aligned green/red diffstat; dir truncates trailing-aligned, basename never. Unified+split+sticky share one helper; deleted header_sigil_runs + old sticky_header fn. +2 unit tests (split_header_path, header population).

stories.title: Type scale, gutter, context wash, word-diff tuning
stories.notes: Migrated EVERY text_size(px(N)) literal across diff/ + app/diff_sidebar/ to crate::ui_primitives::{LABEL_XS/SM,BODY,BODY_EMPHASIS} (9px bumped to LABEL_XS=10, the scale floor; equal-valued swaps elsewhere are visual no-ops). New RowPalette.context_bg(muted .025)+gutter_bg(muted .045): context rows get a document wash, every content row paints a gutter-region rail quad so the line-number column reads as a structural rail. Word-diff bg alpha 0.40->0.28 on dark only (light keeps vc_word_* 0.40). Gutter width already fixed per diff-session (derived from precomputed max_line_no, no per-frame jitter).

stories.title: Readable interactive states + token-guard
stories.notes: Selected column = ui.accent.opacity(0.08) tinted header + a 3px absolute left accent bar (replaced the ~invisible 1px bottom accent border, now a neutral ui.border divider). Sticky header elevated above the inline card via sticky_header_bg=surface.blend(text 0.06) (US-005). Drag-target border hex 0x0ea5e9bf -> ui.accent.opacity(0.75). ColumnState::Failed -> widgets::Callout(Error, TriangleAlert, stderr description); Loading -> panel_empty_state(animate, loader-circle.svg). 'token-guard' (raw-hex leak) covered by the drag-border fix.

stories.title: Keyboard-first review loop
stories.notes: 5 actions Diff{Next,Prev}Hunk/DiffToggleView/DiffToggleSync/DiffDismiss (actions.rs + registry.rs + defaults.rs), all context 'DiffView && !Terminal && !TextInput' — !Terminal protects embedded review terminals, !TextInput protects the base-branch FILTER input (a focus-descendant of the DiffView, so bare u/s/[/] would otherwise be stolen from it). Keys: [ / ] hunk nav (->goto_hunk), u view, s sync, Esc dismiss_overlays. Body+header click now window.focus(&focus_handle) so the loop is live without tabbing in. Hunk counter pivots on cur_y+HUNK_JUMP_MARGIN (matches goto_hunk parking), not the cumulative count. Open Question resolved: [/] over J/K.

stories.title: Make click-to-ask visible and named
stories.notes: Hover tooltip on changed lines, mode-aware: Unified 'Click to ask an agent about this line', Split 'Switch to Unified view to ask…'. actionable_row_at extended to detect changed Split rows (CellKind::Added/Removed) for the tooltip only — no misleading pointer/highlight in Split. New DiffView.ask_hint_dismissed field + render_ask_hint onboarding bar (shows while ≥1 column has changes, no review CLI running, Unified mode, not dismissed; × to dismiss). Review button -> toolbar_pill (sparkles + 'Review') in both the per-column header and the solo toolbar, replacing the bare 18px eye.

stories.title: Reliable review prefill
stories.notes: New config review_prefill_delay_ms (Option<u64>, default 2000, clamp [250,10000], resolved_review_prefill_delay_ms()) replaces the hardcoded REVIEW_PREFILL_DELAY_MS const (deleted from view.rs); both review.rs launch paths (send_to_review + launch_review) read it. Schema + schemas/paneflow.schema.json + the 2 exhaustive PaneFlowConfig test-builders updated. Stepper added at Settings -> AI Agent -> Review (review_prefill_row). The clipboard hint in the review-terminal header is now a prominent accent pill 'Prompt ready · {key} to paste', rendered the instant the terminal mounts (before the prefill timer). Clipboard write stays the synchronous safety net. Cold-start (slow CLI) GUI verification pending (headless host).

stories.title: Legible scope selector + onboarding states
stories.notes: scope_header.rs: project + branches triggers demoted to ui.muted secondary labels under the primary scope chip (›-separated hierarchy kept). Worktree-scope branch badge shows '{chosen}/{total} branches' (or 'All {total} branches'), total eagerly fetched off-thread via refresh_diff_available_worktrees on Worktree-scope entry in rebuild_diff_view (guarded to once per repo; degrades to chosen-only when unknown). Empty states -> panel_empty_state: no-repo (git-branch icon + title + positioning hint; open-project affordance = breadcrumb project picker), loading (animated loader-circle + active branch name), no-changes ('Clean'). Sidebar filter renders only when ≥1 changed file exists (has_files gate).

stories.title: Per-file actions in the sidebar
stories.notes: diff_sidebar/rows.rs file row gains .relative().group(...) + a right-anchored group_hover cluster (collapse chevron_up + copy file-text, icon_button_sm), revealed on hover. Both route via the scope's host: new pub DiffView::{toggle_file_collapse,copy_file_diff} and MultiRepoDiffView::active_{toggle_file_collapse,copy_file_diff} (copy_file_diff resolves the file index from path -> copy_scope file scope). Vertical rhythm: directory rows bumped 24->28px to match the file-row height (they interleave in tree mode); shared 10px+indent / 12px padding rail.

stories.title: Session-to-column matching (zero new parsing)
stories.notes: Pure `agent_sessions::match_sessions_to_column(sessions, col_path, col_branch)` ranks cwd-matched sessions by branch-match then ISO-8601 recency (stable sort). `attribution_for_column(cwd, branch)` orchestrates the enabled readers + match, folded into the off-thread column-load task (loader.rs smol::unblock) — no second async round-trip. Result stored on `Column.attribution`, re-fetched only on re-diff; per-frame render O(1). Dropped the AC's `time_window` param (a pure fn has no clock; recency sort covers it). `#[allow(dead_code)]` removed from `SessionMeta::git_branch` (now consumed). Tests: branch-then-recency ranking + non-cwd drop + empty-branch fallback.

stories.title: Agent badge in the column header
stories.notes: New view/attribution.rs seam. render_attribution_badge renders between the file-count chip and the base chip: brand-tinted agent svg (Claude orange / Codex blue / OpenCode text) + short model name (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku/GPT-5) + '~$X.XX (est.)'. Empty attribution -> None (zero-width slot, header pixel-identical to today). Hover AttributionTooltip (custom Render, multi-line) lists each matched session (agent · model · relative-time · cost) most-relevant first + aggregate token tiers + 'estimated · prices vVERSION'.

stories.title: Token usage + model parsing
stories.notes: SessionMeta += model: Option<String>, usage: Option<AssistantUsage{input,output,cache_read,cache_creation}> (additive; AssistantUsage has total()/add()/is_empty()). Claude + Codex readers parametrized (read_session_meta_inner(path, scan_usage)): scan_usage=false is the unchanged title-only popover path (bounded 256, cached); scan_usage=true is the attribution path bounded by MODEL_USAGE_SCAN_LIMIT=20k, exposed via read_sessions_with_usage_for_cwd (bypasses the title mtime cache — Column-cached instead). Claude aggregates message.usage across assistant turns + captures message.model. Codex captures turn_context.payload.model + the last cumulative token_count (normalized: input=uncached, cache_read=cached subset) — best-effort, schema miss -> None. OpenCode model/usage None (CLI contract has neither). Tests: Claude multi-turn aggregation + model capture (and title path leaves both None); Codex model + normalized token_count.

stories.title: Cost estimation + display
stories.notes: New src-app/src/pricing.rs: versioned PRICING_TABLE (Claude opus/sonnet/haiku + Codex gpt-5/gpt) US$/Mtok across 4 tiers, ordered specific->general substring match (lookup), with a documented update procedure + PRICING_TABLE_VERSION. estimate_cost(model, usage) -> Option (None = unpriced model, never fabricated). attribution.rs aggregates per-worktree (column_cost) + across worktrees (attribution_total -> toolbar 'Total ~$X.XX (est.) · N worktrees', hidden when nothing priced). Badge shows '~$X.XX (est.)'; tooltip carries 'prices vVERSION' + token tiers; unpriced model shows tokens, no cost. format_cost uses 3 decimals sub-cent. Tests: lookup ordering, tier sum, unknown->None, format_cost. Pricing figures are estimates as of 2026-06-17.

stories.title: First-class "Direct agent at this hunk"
stories.notes: Floating per-hunk action cluster `render_hunk_actions` (interaction.rs): a deferred+anchored overlay revealed above the cursor while hovering a changed line over a resolvable hunk (reuses US-010 hover_line/last_body_pos), NOT in the right-click menu. Keyboard `a` (DiffActOnHunk) → act_on_hunk_under_cursor: hunk under mouse, else viewport-pivot hunk of the selected column (keyboard-only loop). Both → act_on_hunk → send_to_review (same send path as ask_review_about_hunk; existing right-click 'Ask' kept as the review-framed sibling). Primary button 'Direct agent' (sparkles), act-framed prompt; pre-filled, no auto-submit, no Paneflow git write. GUI pass pending (headless — cluster positioning especially).

stories.title: Fix-and-stage prompt variant
stories.notes: `build_cli_hunk_prompt(HunkAction::FixStage, path, diff)` in review_terminal.rs (the three act intents unified under one builder + a HunkAction enum, rather than a standalone build_cli_fix_prompt): directs the CLI to apply the good parts and stage selectively via `git add -p`/`git apply` and explain what it kept/dropped. Surfaced as the cluster's 'Fix & stage' button (check icon). Agent runs the git action in the witnessed terminal; Paneflow runs no git write. Test: hunk_prompts_differ_by_intent_and_never_promise_native_staging.

stories.title: Safe agent-mediated discard + shell escape hatch
stories.notes: Cluster 'Discard' button uses the two-step armed pattern (DiffView.hunk_discard_armed): first click arms → red 'Confirm discard' pill (danger = diff deleted color), second executes act_on_hunk(HunkAction::Discard) (prompt directs git restore/checkout -p + 'show the command before running'). Disarms on hover-line transition (render_column on_mouse_move) or any act (act_on_hunk clears it). Per-column header terminal button AND the solo-scope toolbar terminal button now tooltip 'Open a shell here to run git commands in this worktree' (manual-git escape hatch). GUI pass pending (headless).
